creator: bdrewery@FreeBSD.org
text:
Yes:

tt-rss# pkg info tt-rss
...
Options        :
        CURL           : on
        DBLOCAL        : on
        GD             : on
        MYSQL          : on
        PGSQL          : off

The rc file has:
   start_precmd=${name}_prestart
Seems the DBLOCAL is not properly added to PLIST_SUB.
